pr_text:
## Title: Fix double-free vulnerability in NR UE measurement reporting cleanup

### Summary
The `handle_meas_reporting_remove` function in the NR UE RRC module contained a double-free vulnerability when cleaning up measurement reporting structures. The code unconditionally freed `rrc->MeasReport[id]` without verifying the pointer was valid or clearing it after deallocation. This could cause memory corruption and crashes if measurement reporting was reconfigured multiple times for the same measur
